r_sub: Private door-to-door transfers across Cancún & the Riviera Maya. Tell us where you’re headed.
seatNote: Baby & booster seats available free on request — just tell us the age in comments.
flightSub: We track your flight so we’re there waiting — even if it’s early or delayed.
coCommentsPh: Anything we should know? Car seat age, extra luggage…
coPayNote: After your purchase you’ll get an email confirming payment with detailed pick-up instructions.
done_body: Your private transfer is reserved. Check your email for confirmation and pick-up instructions.
home_aboutTitle: Your trusted ground partner in the Riviera Maya
home_aboutBody: Cancún Transfer Hotels is a locally-owned transportation company moving travelers safely across Cancún, Playa del Carmen, Tulum and the whole Riviera Maya. Certified drivers, late-model vehicles and a 24/7 bilingual team make every transfer effortless from the moment you land.
home_amenSub: Private, spotless vehicles stocked with the details that make the difference.

home_amenities.title: A/C & comfort
home_amenities.desc: Fully air-conditioned vans & SUVs with spacious seating for the whole group.

home_amenities.title: Complimentary water
home_amenities.desc: Cold bottled water waiting for you on board after your flight.

home_amenities.title: Baby & booster seats
home_amenities.desc: Child seats available free on request — just tell us the age.

home_amenities.title: GPS tracked
home_amenities.desc: Live GPS tracking and flight monitoring on every certified vehicle.

home_amenities.title: Generous luggage
home_amenities.desc: Plenty of room for all your bags, strollers and sports equipment.

home_amenities.title: Fully insured
home_amenities.desc: Licensed vehicles with travel insurance included on every ride.

home_payBody: Reserve online in minutes. Every payment is encrypted and protected — taxes always included, with no hidden fees.

home_payTrust.title: Secured by PayPal
home_payTrust.desc: Pay with your PayPal balance or any major card.

home_payTrust.title: Taxes included
home_payTrust.desc: The price you see is the price you pay — no surprises.

home_testimonials.quote: Our flight landed at 2am and the driver was right there with a sign. Spotless van and ice-cold water — exactly what we needed.
home_testimonials.name: Sarah M.

home_testimonials.quote: Booked round-trip for our family of six. On time both ways and the baby seats were a lifesaver. Will book again.
home_testimonials.name: David R.

home_testimonials.quote: Best transfer service in Cancún. Easy booking, fair price and a friendly driver. Highly recommend to anyone.
home_testimonials.name: Laura G.
